objective: Make every message contribute to progress
mantra: Work IN the chat, not THROUGH the chat
quality_principle: 1 chat at 10/10 quality > 5 chats at 2/10 quality

connection.example: hows your sister? is she out of hospital?

selling.example: want to see what im wearing?

balance_principle: Can't pursue only one type — they build on each other
key_insight: Using past information creates powerful connection
review_recommendation: Review this module 2-3 times — most important
